job_summary: Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. They are seeking an engineer to enhance the query optimization and execution layer of Aurora DSQL, focusing on designing and implementing query optimization algorithms and core execution engine improvements.
